column1: # Q-Periapt combiner/primitive microbenchmark — the source data behind tab:bench / tab:bench-ci.
# Host: arm64 (Apple Silicon) dev host. Tool: Criterion
# CI columns are Criterion's 95% confidence interval on the mean.
# Regenerate: cargo bench -p q-periapt-backends   (then read target/criterion/*/new/estimates.json)
# This is the SUPPORTING microbench; the bare-metal time-to-session (paper/camera-ready-results.txt
# tab:baremetal) is the primary network measurement. Run-to-run variance is ~1 us.
